overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Watch Dogs: Legion) showing a character in a metallic coat walking along the Thames riverbank in London at night. The character ascends from the muddy lower waterfront to a paved upper promenade with restaurants, passing pedestrians and landmarks including Tower Bridge and The Shard.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside mudflats and rocky shoreline at low tide

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the uneven muddy riverbank with the illuminated city skyline visible across the dark water

entered.detail: dark water of the river reflecting city lights
iconic bridge with red illumination visible in the distance
tall concrete retaining wall with stairs and buildings above
trees with orange and red foliage illuminated by street lamps
distant illuminated skyscrapers across the river

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the exposed muddy riverbank at low tide, with the Thames on the left and a high concrete embankment wall on the right. Tower Bridge glows red in the distant city skyline, and autumn trees with orange leaves overhang the path from above.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide concrete staircase ascending from riverbank to upper promenade

events.description: character transitions from walking on flat ground to ascending the staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete stairs up to the riverside walkway level, passing under a green banner

entered.detail: wide flight of concrete stairs with dark metal railings on the left
illuminated green banner reading 'LONDON IS FOR EVERYONE' suspended above the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a broad concrete staircase from the lower riverbank to the upper promenade level. A green illuminated banner hangs overhead between modern buildings, and the river view becomes temporarily obscured by the stairwell structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside pedestrian promenade with outdoor restaurants and sculptures

events.description: passing a large metallic dragon sculpture on a stone pedestal
Tower Bridge comes into full view as the character rounds the corner of the building

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved promenade past outdoor cafes and other pedestrians, with Tower Bridge visible ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light jacket walking ahead in the same direction
pedestrian carrying an umbrella walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wet tiled pedestrian walkway reflecting street lights
modern eatery with red umbrellas and outdoor seating
large intricate metallic dragon statue on a stone pedestal
fully visible suspension bridge with blue and gold lighting
classical stone facade with arched windows and warm interior lighting

segments.scene_description: On the upper promenade, the character walks past outdoor restaurant seating and other pedestrians on the wet paved surface. A striking metallic dragon sculpture stands on a pedestal along the path, and as the character progresses, Tower Bridge becomes fully visible in the distance alongside The Shard's illuminated spire.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a desolate, muddy riverbank to a vibrant, illuminated urban promenade. It begins with the character walking along the exposed banks of the Thames at low tide, flanked by a high concrete wall and orange autumn foliage while Tower Bridge glows in the distant skyline. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts upward through a broad concrete staircase, passing beneath a green illuminated banner as the river view is momentarily obscured by the surrounding architecture. The camera then emerges onto a wet paved promenade, gliding past outdoor restaurant seating and a metallic dragon sculpture. Finally, the environment opens up to reveal a wide vista of the city night, with the illuminated spire of The Shard and the full silhouette of Tower Bridge dominating the horizon.
